title: National Cybersecurity Policy 2024
summary: High-level policy framework to strengthen national cyber posture, protect critical infrastructure, and enhance digital trust across public and private sectors in Nigeria.

title: Kenya Data Protection Act 2023
summary: Comprehensive data protection regulation establishing rights for data subjects and obligations for data controllers and processors in Kenya.

title: South Africa Electronic Communications Act Amendment
summary: Amendment to the Electronic Communications Act focusing on telecommunications security, infrastructure sharing, and spectrum allocation for 5G networks.

title: Ghana Cybersecurity Strategy 2023-2027
summary: Five-year strategic plan outlining Ghana's approach to building cyber resilience, fostering innovation, and establishing regional leadership in cybersecurity.

title: Rwanda Digital Transformation Policy 2024
summary: Policy framework for accelerating digital transformation in government services, education, healthcare, and agriculture through ICT adoption.

title: Senegal Personal Data Protection Law 2023
summary: Legal framework establishing principles for personal data processing, cross-border data transfers, and enforcement mechanisms for data protection violations.

title: Morocco National AI Strategy 2024
summary: Strategic roadmap for AI development and adoption with emphasis on ethics, workforce training, and building AI capabilities in key economic sectors.

title: Tanzania Cybercrime Act 2024
summary: Legislative framework defining cybercrime offenses, investigation procedures, and penalties for digital fraud, hacking, and online harassment.

title: Côte d'Ivoire E-Commerce Regulation 2023
summary: Regulatory framework for e-commerce transactions, consumer protection online, digital payments, and resolution of e-commerce disputes.

title: Egypt National Cybersecurity Law 2023
summary: Comprehensive law establishing cybersecurity standards for critical sectors, incident response protocols, and a national cybersecurity council.

title: Uganda Data Localization Policy 2024
summary: Policy mandating local storage and processing of certain categories of personal and government data within Uganda's borders to enhance data sovereignty.

title: Botswana ICT Policy Framework 2024
summary: Comprehensive ICT policy addressing digital inclusion, broadband expansion, cybersecurity, and the development of local ICT industry capabilities.
